item.title: Notiqflow 0.3.2
item.description:
Notiqflow 0.3.2

  • Report bugs without leaving Notiqflow. Use the new ladybug Report bug… action to send a summary, reproduction steps, severity, and optional reply email directly to the Notiqflow team.
  • Privacy-conscious diagnostics. Reports include only the app version, macOS version, processor architecture, and build type shown in the form. Notiqflow never attaches audio, dictated text, dictionary contents, or destination-app data.
  • Clear follow-up references. Successful reports return a reference code so you can identify the report if you need to follow up.
